text: Many two-year bioassays of dioxin-like chemicals showed both sustained AHR activation measured by CYP induction as well as an extensive proliferative/regenerative response in the liver (NTP, 2006a, 2006b, 2006c, 2006d, 2006e, 2006f). The AO of liver tumors occurs toward the end of the lifespan and requires an MIE level of around 100 pbb-weeks.
